items.title: Walter Wu — Founder of HiRey, building an agent-amplified trusted connector network
items.summary: Walter Wu explains the HiRey thesis from the Launch Map stage: agents can do the workflow around finding people, follow-up, and scheduling, while trusted humans keep judgment, vouching, and high-stakes introductions.

items.title: Zubair Zafar — Full-stack engineer and AI builder looking for an autonomous product role in San Francisco
items.summary: Zubair Zafar talks about coming from Pakistan to the U.S., earning a full-ride Master's in Computer Science at Eastern Illinois University, building multi-agent real-estate workflows, doing MRI computer-vision research, and moving to San Francisco to join a meaningful builder community.
